name: warhex
description: WARHEX production-ready chess platform monorepo with React, Express, Socket.IO, and SQLite.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @royal-square/shared && npm run build --workspace @royal-square/ui && npm run build --workspace @royal-square/server && npm run build --workspace @royal-square/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @royal-square/shared && npm run test --workspace @royal-square/ui && npm run test --workspace @royal-square/server && npm run test --workspace @royal-square/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @royal-square/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @royal-square/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace @royal-square/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @royal-square/web
